# playgroundDescription

**Instance Property**

A description of the linear regressor shown in a playground.

## Declaration

```swift
var playgroundDescription: Any { get }
```

## Describing a linear regressor

- **description**: A text representation of the linear regressor.
- **debugDescription**: A text representation of the linear regressor that’s suitable for output during debugging.
